title: Financial Institution Workspace
description: Every screen a bank uses: the queue, the applicant, the reports, the decision.

steps.title: Your review queue
steps.voiceScript: Applications submitted to your institution land in this queue.
steps.captionText: Applications submitted to your institution land in this queue.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your review queue: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open an applicant
steps.description: Design, BOQ and financial model in one pack.
steps.voiceScript: Open an applicant to read the design, the BOQ and the financial model.
steps.captionText: Open an applicant to read the design, the BOQ and the financial model.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open an applicant: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Assess
steps.description: An AI assessment scores the application.
steps.voiceScript: An AI assessment scores the application against your criteria.
steps.captionText: An AI assessment scores the application against your criteria.
steps.fallbackMessage: Assess: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Decide
steps.description: Approve in principle, request information, or decline.
steps.voiceScript: Approve in principle, request more information, or decline.
steps.captionText: Approve in principle, request more information, or decline.
steps.fallbackMessage: Decide: not visible on this screen yet.
